# Delta9

> OpenCode plugin for strategic AI coordination with Commander + Council + Operators architecture.

Delta9 implements a hierarchical multi-agent system that separates planning from execution, maintains mission state across context compactions, and verifies all work against acceptance criteria.

## Quick Start

1. Read `CLAUDE.md` (project overview with code examples)
2. Read `docs/spec.md` (source of truth - full specification)
3. See `docs/README.md` for navigation

## Project Overview

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Project overview, code examples, boundaries
- [docs/spec.md](docs/spec.md): Full specification (876 lines)
- [docs/README.md](docs/README.md): Documentation navigation hub
- [docs/BACKLOG.md](docs/BACKLOG.md): Task tracking & roadmap

## Architecture

- [docs/delta9/architecture.md](docs/delta9/architecture.md): System design diagrams
- [docs/delta9/agents.md](docs/delta9/agents.md): All 19 agents with prompts
- [docs/delta9/api.md](docs/delta9/api.md): Internal API reference

## Agents (19 Total)

### Command Layer
- **Commander**: Lead planner, never writes code (Opus recommended)

### Council Layer (4 Oracles)
- **CIPHER** (Claude): Architecture & edge cases
- **VECTOR** (GPT): Code patterns & logic
- **PRISM** (Gemini): UI/UX & creativity
- **APEX** (DeepSeek): Performance & algorithms

### Execution Layer
- **Operator**: Task executor (Sonnet)
- **Validator**: QA gate (Haiku)

### Delta Team (8 Support Agents)
- **RECON**: Fast codebase reconnaissance (Haiku)
- **SIGINT**: Intelligence research (Sonnet)
- **TACCOM**: Tactical command advisor (GPT 4o)
- **SURGEON**: Surgical precision fixer (Haiku)
- **SENTINEL**: Quality assurance guardian (Sonnet)
- **SCRIBE**: Documentation writer (Gemini Flash)
- **FACADE**: Frontend operations (Gemini Flash)
- **SPECTRE**: Visual intelligence (Gemini Flash)

## Library Modules (183 Exports)

### Core Infrastructure
- `src/lib/paths.ts`: File path utilities
- `src/lib/config.ts`: Configuration loading
- `src/lib/logger.ts`: Structured logging
- `src/lib/errors.ts`: Error handling
- `src/lib/hints.ts`: Contextual hints

### Agent Infrastructure
- `src/lib/background-manager.ts`: Background task management
- `src/lib/models.ts`: Model resolution & fallback chains
- `src/lib/budget.ts`: Cost tracking with MODEL_COSTS
- `src/lib/rate-limiter.ts`: Rate limit handling

### Production Patterns (14 NEW)
- `src/lib/concurrency-manager.ts`: Per-provider slot limits (Anthropic:4, OpenAI:5)
- `src/lib/process-cleanup.ts`: Graceful shutdown with SIGINT/SIGTERM
- `src/lib/event-store.ts`: Event sourcing with snapshots
- `src/lib/session-isolation.ts`: Root session tracking for multi-user
- `src/lib/injection-tracker.ts`: Context deduplication
- `src/lib/storage-adapter.ts`: Storage abstraction (File/Memory)
- `src/lib/semantic-search.ts`: Weighted memory search
- `src/lib/multi-mode-tool.ts`: Multi-mode tool dispatcher
- `src/lib/idle-maintenance.ts`: Debounced background maintenance
- `src/lib/compliance-hooks.ts`: Workflow compliance enforcement
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Toast + batch notifications

### Dynamic Agent Loading
- `src/agents/loader.ts`: Load agents from markdown with YAML frontmatter

## Key Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/index.ts` | Plugin entry point |
| `src/lib/index.ts` | All lib exports (183) |
| `src/agents/commander.ts` | Commander agent |
| `src/agents/operator.ts` | Operator agent |
| `src/agents/validator.ts` | Validator agent |
| `src/agents/loader.ts` | Dynamic agent loader |
| `.delta9/mission.json` | Mission state (runtime) |
| `.delta9/history.jsonl` | Event history |
| `.delta9/events.jsonl` | Event store |
| `.delta9/agents/` | Custom agent definitions |

## Commands

```bash
npm run build      # Build TypeScript
npm run test       # Run 1165+ tests
npm run lint       # ESLint check
npm run typecheck  # TypeScript strict mode
```

## Stats

- **Version**: 0.1.0
- **Tests**: 1165+ passing
- **Exports**: 183 from lib
- **Tools**: 70+
- **Agents**: 19
- **Patterns**: 14 production patterns
